text:
--On Monday, November 29, 2010 1:20 AM +0000 Edwin Groothuis 
<edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of www/phpwebgallery,
>
> Please note that PR ports/152659 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/152659
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
Please go ahead.

-glz
